description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and backport branches, on tags matching v*, on pull requests to master and backport branches, and daily at 6AM UTC. The workflow consists of three jobs: lint, test, and deploy. The lint job checks out the code, sets up Python, caches PyPI dependencies, installs dependencies, installs the package itself, runs a linter, and checks twine. The test job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, checks out the code, sets up Python, caches PyPI dependencies, installs dependencies, and runs unittests with coverage. The deploy job runs only on push of a tag, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, builds the package, and creates a release.
